title: calophyllum paniculatum
intro: Calophyllum paniculatum, also known as the Yellow Balau or Kamani, is a tropical tree species native to the Pacific Islands and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Calophyllum paniculatum include its potential to reduce fever, treat skin conditions, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Calophyllum paniculatum include essential oils, extracts, and tinctures, which can be used to create topical creams, ointments, and salves for various health applications.
